common.askAssistantInstead: For now, ask the assistant about this.

settings.pageSubtitle: Tune Lingaru to fit how you learn, profile, preferences, and account in one place.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: How you appear in the app and your default learning targets
profile.targetLanguageDescription: The language you're learning. Different from the app's interface language.
profile.switchLanguageConfirmBody: Your {{currentLanguage}} progress is preserved. Most {{language}} features show 'coming soon' for now.

language.title: Interface language
language.description: Switch the language of the app chrome (nav, settings, buttons). The language being learned is always French.

mode.title: Choose your mode
mode.description: Mode tailors the home page, navigation, and color palette of the entire app.
mode.currentLevelDescription: We use your level to calibrate vocabulary and exercise difficulty.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Switch between light and dark mode

security.passwordDescription: Pick a strong password you don't reuse
security.telegramDescription: Get reminders and quick practice on Telegram
security.telegramNotLinked: Not linked. Start the Lingaru bot on Telegram and send /start to connect your account.
security.documentsDescription: Upload French textbooks and notes, the AI assistant uses them to give grounded answers.
security.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account all data is permanently removed.

memory.title: What the assistant remembers
memory.subtitle: Notes here are injected into every assistant conversation. The assistant cannot delete or edit these, only you can.
memory.empty: No notes yet. Add one above, or ask the assistant to remember something.
memory.placeholderExample: e.g. Always confuse depuis and pendant
memory.errorToast: Could not save memory note. Please try again.

onboarding.languageTitle: What language do you want to learn?
onboarding.languageSubtitle: We'll tailor your lessons and assistant to this language. You can change it in Settings.
onboarding.step1Title: How do you want to learn?
onboarding.step1Subtitle: We tailor the home page and navigation to your goal. You can change this in Settings any time.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: We use your level to calibrate vocabulary and exercises. Don't sweat it, you can adjust later.
onboarding.placementSubtitle: Take a 5-minute placement test; we'll adapt as you go.
onboarding.placementStubBody: The CEFR placement test is coming soon. For now, pick the level closest to where you are; we'll adapt to your answers.

general.title: General learner
general.description: Lessons, vocabulary, grammar, games, news. The full path, with no exam pressure.

exam.title: Exam prep (TCF / TEF)
exam.tagline: I have an exam coming up
exam.description: Exam-focused dashboard, targeted drills, timed simulations. All other resources stay available.

agentic.title: Agent mode
agentic.description: The AI assistant is my home page. I invoke features directly from chat.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to keep building your French
auth.registerSubtitle: A few details and you're in

assistant.title: Conversation
assistant.subtitle: Speak freely in French, Claire will correct you as you chat.

agents.pageSubtitle: Specialized AI tutors for grammar, writing, vocabulary and more.
agents.empty: No agents available yet. The administrator can add some via the Django panel.

news.pageSubtitle: Daily articles tuned to your level.

dictionary.pageSubtitle: Look up French words, get definitions, examples, and pronunciations.

progress.pageSubtitle: Your learning streak, mastered words, and time invested.

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.subtitle: Listen and type what you hear.

pronunciation.title: Pronunciation
pronunciation.subtitle: Read aloud and get scored on your pronunciation.

srs.title: Flashcards
srs.subtitle: Spaced repetition for vocabulary you've seen.
